name: Alimentos y Bebidas
description: Productos alimenticios, bebidas, snacks, suplementos nutricionales, y cualquier producto destinado al consumo humano. Regulaciones específicas de inocuidad, etiquetado y salud.

biz_evaluator.context: Evaluate food product viability: shelf life constraints, cold chain requirements, food safety certifications needed (HACCP, BRC, SQF), retail category dynamics, and alignment with consumer health and wellness trends.

brand_guardian.context: Food brand strategy: packaging design for shelf impact, health claim positioning, certifications as brand equity (organic, non-GMO, gluten-free, Kosher/Halal), and brand storytelling around provenance, ingredients, and sustainability.

growth_hacker.context: Food brand growth: recipe content marketing (YouTube, TikTok), food blogger and nutritionist outreach, in-store and event sampling campaigns, health community influencers, and social proof through dietitian endorsements.

marketing_strategist.context: Food marketing: retail shelf placement and planogram strategy, shopper marketing and in-store activations, food media partnerships, seasonal campaigns, and health/wellness positioning in advertising.

sales_lead.context: Food retail distribution: supermarket and club store buyer negotiations, slotting fees and promotional allowances, food broker/distributor network setup, food service channel (restaurants, hotels, catering), and DTC e-commerce strategy.

cfo_finance.context: Food economics: COGS including ingredients, packaging, and co-manufacturing costs; spoilage and waste provisions; slotting fees and trade promotion budgets; seasonal demand cash flow management; and minimum viable production run economics.

legal_expert.context: Food regulations: FDA/COFEPRIS/EFSA compliance by target market, nutritional labeling requirements (Nutrition Facts, front-of-pack warnings), health claim restrictions, HACCP food safety plan requirements, organic certification process, and import/export food permits and phytosanitary certificates.

customer_success.context: Food consumer loyalty: recipe engagement and community building, subscription food box models, handling product complaints and potential recalls (crisis protocol), and repeat purchase incentive programs.

competitor_analyst.context: Food competitive landscape: category share by SKU and brand, price-per-unit benchmarks at retail, ingredient trend analysis, private label competition intensity, and health claim differentiation white spaces.
